content.text:
Please act as a senior CI/CD + Java + Node troubleshooting engineer.
I need you to fix a failing internal validation pipeline with minimal, targeted changes.

Context:

Repository structure validation passes.
Docker build and container startup pass.
Test stage fails.
Observed failures:

Frontend tests fail with: jest not found.
API functional tests fail to compile because code uses Java 11+ APIs (java.net.http, Map.of, String.isBlank, Path.of), but the test runtime/image is Java 8.
Unified test summary step throws an awk syntax error and reports zero totals.
Your task:

Identify the exact root causes.
Propose the smallest safe fix set to make pipeline pass.
Keep compatibility with the existing pipeline approach.
Do not change business logic.
Do not modify temporary/session artifacts handling.
Required output format:

Root cause analysis (short).
Concrete patch plan (ordered).
Exact code changes as unified diffs for each affected file.
Any Docker/test-runner/image version updates needed.
Exact commands to validate locally and in CI.
Rollback plan if changes fail.
Acceptance criteria:

Frontend tests execute successfully in pipeline environment.
API functional tests compile and run in pipeline environment.
Summary step completes without awk errors and reports real totals.
No unrelated refactors.

24:

26: npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?
27: 
28: echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
29: if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
30:   echo "Using existing API server on http://localhost:8080"
31: else
32:   echo "Starting API server with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test"
33:   SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &
34:   SERVER_PID=$!
35:   API_READY=0
36:   for _ in {1..60}; do
37:     if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
38:       API_READY=1
39:       break
40:     fi
41:     sleep 2
42:   done
43:   if [[ "$API_READY" -ne 1 ]]; then
44:     echo "API server failed to start. See target/api-server.log"
45:     API_EXIT=1
46:   fi
47: fi
48: 
49: if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
50:   bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh || API_EXIT=$?
51: fi
52: 
53: read_prop() {
54:   local file="$1"
55:   local key="$2"
56:   if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
57:     echo "0"
58:     return
59:   fi
60:   awk -F= -v k="$key" '$1==k {print $2}' "$file"
61: }
62: 
63: read_json_number() {
64:   local file="$1"
65:   local key="$2"
66:   if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
67:     echo "0"
68:     return
69:   fi
70:   local value
71:   value=$(grep -o '"'"$key"'"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*' "$file" | awk -F: 'NR==1 {gsub(/[[:space:]]/, "", $2); print $2}')
72:   if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
73:     echo "0"
74:   else
75:     echo "$value"
76:   fi
77: }
78: 
79: UNIT_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "total")
80: UNIT_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "passed")
81: UNIT_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "failed")
82: 
83: FRONTEND_TOTAL=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numTotalTests")
84: FRONTEND_PASSED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numPassedTests")
85: FRONTEND_FAILED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numFailedTests")
86: 
87: API_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "total")
88: API_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "passed")
89: API_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "failed")
90: 
91: TOTAL_ALL=$((UNIT_TOTAL + FRONTEND_TOTAL + API_TOTAL))
92: PASSED_ALL=$((UNIT_PASSED + FRONTEND_PASSED + API_PASSED))
93: FAILED_ALL=$((UNIT_FAILED + FRONTEND_FAILED + API_FAILED))
94: 
95: echo
96: echo "=== Unified Test Summary ==="
97: echo "backend_unit: total=$UNIT_TOTAL passed=$UNIT_PASSED failed=$UNIT_FAILED"
98: echo "frontend: total=$FRONTEND_TOTAL passed=$FRONTEND_PASSED failed=$FRONTEND_FAILED"
99: echo "api_functional: total=$API_TOTAL passed=$API_PASSED failed=$API_FAILED"
100: echo "TOTAL: total=$TOTAL_ALL passed=$PASSED_ALL failed=$FAILED_ALL"
101: 
102: if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$FRONTEND_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$API_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
103:   exit 1
104: fi
105: 
106: exit 0

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -uo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

mkdir -p target

UNIT_EXIT=0
FRONTEND_EXIT=0
API_EXIT=0
SERVER_PID=""

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${SERVER_PID}" ]]; then
    kill "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    wait "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

# Allow overriding SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, default to 'test' if not set
SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:-test}"

# Run API functional tests in a Docker container (no Java required on host)
docker run --rm \
	-v "$PWD":/workspace \
	-w /workspace \
	-e SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="$SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE" \
	maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-8 \
	bash -c "mkdir -p target/api-functional-tests && javac -d target/api-functional-tests API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java && java -cp target/api-functional-tests APIFunctionalTests"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
REPORT_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/target/unit-test-summary.properties"

cd "$ROOT_DIR"
mkdir -p target

mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test

total=0
failures=0
errors=0
skipped=0

for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
  [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
  tests_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/tests="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
  failures_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/failures="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")

<path>C:\Users\user\Desktop\eaglepoint_new\Week-1\TASK-47\repo\API_tests\ApiFunctionalTests.java</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import java.io.IOException;
2: import java.io.OutputStream;
3: import java.net.URI;
4: import java.net.http.HttpClient;
5: import java.net.http.HttpRequest;
6: import java.net.http.HttpResponse;
7: import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
8: import java.nio.file.Files;
9: import java.nio.file.Path;
10: import java.time.Duration;
11: import java.time.Instant;
12: import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
13: import java.util.Map;
14: import java.util.regex.Matcher;
15: import java.util.regex.Pattern;
16: 
17: public final class ApiFunctionalTests {
18:   private static final HttpClient CLIENT = HttpClient.newBuilder()
19:       .connectTimeout(Duration.ofSeconds(10))
20:       .build();
21: 
22:   private static final String BASE_URL =
23:       System.getenv().getOrDefault("SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8080");
24: 
25:   private static int total;
26:   private static int passed;
27:   private static int failed;
28: 
29:   private static String token;
30:   private static String username;
31: 
32:   private ApiFunctionalTests() {}
33: 
34:   public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
35:     waitForApiReady();
36: 
37:     run("registration_authentication_flow", ApiFunctionalTests::registrationAuthenticationFlow);
38:     run("event_search_flow", ApiFunctionalTests::eventSearchFlow);
39:     run("seat_reservation_flow", ApiFunctionalTests::seatReservationFlow);
40:     run("moderation_reporting_flow", ApiFunctionalTests::moderationReportingFlow);
41: 
42:     writeSummary();
43:     if (failed > 0) {
44:       System.exit(1);
45:     }
46:   }
47: 
48:   private static void run(String name, ThrowingRunnable test) {
49:     total += 1;
50:     try {
51:       test.run();
52:       passed += 1;
53:       System.out.println("[PASS] " + name);
54:     } catch (Exception ex) {
55:       failed += 1;
56:       System.out.println("[FAIL] " + name + ": " + ex.getMessage());
57:     }
58:   }
59: 
60:   private static void waitForApiReady() throws Exception {
61:     Instant deadline = Instant.now().plusSeconds(90);
62:     while (Instant.now().isBefore(deadline)) {
63:       HttpResponse<String> response = request("GET", "/api/events", null, null);
64:       if (response.statusCode() == 200) {
65:         return;
66:       }
67:       Thread.sleep(1500);
68:     }
69:     throw new IllegalStateException("API did not become ready at " + BASE_URL);
70:   }
71: 
72:   private static void registrationAuthenticationFlow() throws Exception {
73:     username = "api_user_" + System.currentTimeMillis();
74:     String password = "Passw0rd!23";
75: 
76:     String registrationBody = "{"
77:         + "\"username\":\"" + username + "\"," 
78:         + "\"password\":\"" + password + "\"," 
79:         + "\"role\":\"SENIOR\""
80:         + "}";
81:     HttpResponse<String> registerResponse = request(
82:         "POST",
83:         "/api/security/accounts",
84:         registrationBody,
85:         Map.of("Content-Type", "application/json")
86:     );
87:     requireStatus(registerResponse, 200, 201);
88: 
89:     String loginBody = "{"
90:         + "\"username\":\"" + username + "\"," 
91:         + "\"password\":\"" + password + "\""
92:         + "}";
93:     HttpResponse<String> loginResponse = request(
94:         "POST",
95:         "/api/security/login",
96:         loginBody,
97:         Map.of("Content-Type", "application/json")
98:     );
99:     requireStatus(loginResponse, 200);
100:     token = extractString(loginResponse.body(), "token");
101:     if (token == null || token.isBlank()) {
102:       throw new IllegalStateException("missing token in login response: " + loginResponse.body());
103:     }
104:   }
105: 
106:   private static void eventSearchFlow() throws Exception {
107:     HttpResponse<String> events = request("GET", "/api/events", null, null);
108:     requireStatus(events, 200);
109:     if (!events.body().contains("\"id\"")) {
110:       throw new IllegalStateException("events response did not include ids: " + events.body());
111:     }
112: 
113:     HttpResponse<String> search = request(
114:         "GET",
115:         "/api/discovery/search?q=choir&type=ALL&author=&category=&sort=relevance&page=0&size=5",
116:         null,
117:         null
118:     );
119:     requireStatus(search, 200);
120:     if (!search.body().contains("\"items\"")) {
121:       throw new IllegalStateException("search response missing items: " + search.body());
122:     }
123:   }
124: 
125:   private static void seatReservationFlow() throws Exception {
126:     HttpResponse<String> events = request("GET", "/api/events", null, null);
127:     requireStatus(events, 200);
128:     long eventId = extractFirstLong(events.body(), "id");
129: 
130:     HttpResponse<String> hierarchy = request("GET", "/api/events/" + eventId + "/hierarchy", null, null);
131:     requireStatus(hierarchy, 200);
132:     long sessionId = extractSessionId(hierarchy.body());
133: 
134:     HttpResponse<String> ticketTypes = request("GET", "/api/events/" + eventId + "/ticket-types", null, null);
135:     requireStatus(ticketTypes, 200);
136:     long ticketTypeId = extractFirstLong(ticketTypes.body(), "id");
137: 
138:     HttpResponse<String> seatMap = request(
139:         "GET",
140:         "/api/sessions/" + sessionId + "/seat-map?ticketTypeId=" + ticketTypeId + "&channel=ONLINE_PORTAL",
141:         null,
142:         null
143:     );
144:     requireStatus(seatMap, 200);
145:     long seatId = extractAvailableSeatId(seatMap.body());
146: 
147:     String orderBody = "{"
148:         + "\"eventId\":" + eventId + ","
149:         + "\"sessionId\":" + sessionId + ","
150:         + "\"ticketTypeId\":" + ticketTypeId + ","
151:         + "\"orderCode\":\"API-" + System.currentTimeMillis() + "\","
152:         + "\"buyerReference\":\"" + username + "\","
153:         + "\"channel\":\"ONLINE_PORTAL\","
154:         + "\"seatIds\":[" + seatId + "]"
155:         + "}";
156:     HttpResponse<String> orderResponse = request(
157:         "POST",
158:         "/api/seat-orders",
159:         orderBody,
160:         Map.of(
161:             "Content-Type", "application/json",
162:             "X-Auth-Token", token
163:         )
164:     );
165:     requireStatus(orderResponse, 200, 201);
166:     if (!orderResponse.body().contains("\"orderId\"")) {
167:       throw new IllegalStateException("seat order missing orderId: " + orderResponse.body());
168:     }
169:   }
170: 
171:   private static void moderationReportingFlow() throws Exception {
172:     String boundary = "----SilverStageBoundary" + System.currentTimeMillis();
173:     String multipartBody = "--" + boundary + "\r\n"
174:         + "Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"reportedUser\"\r\n\r\n"
175:         + "reported_demo_user\r\n"
176:         + "--" + boundary + "\r\n"
177:         + "Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"contentType\"\r\n\r\n"
178:         + "ANNOUNCEMENT\r\n"
179:         + "--" + boundary + "\r\n"
180:         + "Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"contentRef\"\r\n\r\n"
181:         + "announcement:3\r\n"
182:         + "--" + boundary + "\r\n"
183:         + "Content-Disposition: form-data; name=\"reason\"\r\n\r\n"
184:         + "API functional test report\r\n"
185:         + "--" + boundary + "--\r\n";
186: 
187:     HttpResponse<String> reportResponse = request(
188:         "POST",
189:         "/api/moderation/reports",
190:         multipartBody,
191:         Map.of(
192:             "Content-Type", "multipart/form-data; boundary=" + boundary,
193:             "X-Auth-Token", token
194:         )
195:     );
196:     requireStatus(reportResponse, 200, 201);
197:     if (!reportResponse.body().contains("\"reportId\"")) {
198:       throw new IllegalStateException("moderation response missing reportId: " + reportResponse.body());
199:     }
200:   }
201: 
202:   private static HttpResponse<String> request(
203:       String method,
204:       String path,
205:       String body,
206:       Map<String, String> headers
207:   ) throws IOException, InterruptedException {
208:     HttpRequest.Builder builder = HttpRequest.newBuilder()
209:         .uri(URI.create(BASE_URL + path))
210:         .timeout(Duration.ofSeconds(15));
211: 
212:     if (headers != null) {
213:       for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : headers.entrySet()) {
214:         builder.header(entry.getKey(), entry.getValue());
215:       }
216:     }
217: 
218:     if (body == null) {
219:       builder.method(method, HttpRequest.BodyPublishers.noBody());
220:     } else {
221:       builder.method(method, HttpRequest.BodyPublishers.ofString(body, StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
222:     }
223: 
224:     return CLIENT.send(builder.build(), HttpResponse.BodyHandlers.ofString(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
225:   }
226: 
227:   private static void requireStatus(HttpResponse<String> response, int... expected) {
228:     int actual = response.statusCode();
229:     for (int value : expected) {
230:       if (actual == value) {
231:         return;
232:       }
233:     }
234:     throw new IllegalStateException("unexpected status " + actual + " body=" + response.body());
235:   }
236: 
237:   private static String extractString(String json, String key) {
238:     Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("\"" + key + "\"\\s*:\\s*\"([^\"]+)\"");
239:     Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(json);
240:     if (matcher.find()) {
241:       return matcher.group(1);
242:     }
243:     return null;
244:   }
245: 
246:   private static long extractFirstLong(String json, String key) {
247:     Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("\"" + key + "\"\\s*:\\s*([0-9]+)");
248:     Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(json);
249:     if (matcher.find()) {
250:       return Long.parseLong(matcher.group(1));
251:     }
252:     throw new IllegalStateException("missing numeric field " + key + " in: " + json);
253:   }
254: 
255:   private static long extractSessionId(String json) {
256:     Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("\"id\"\\s*:\\s*([0-9]+)\\s*,\\s*\"title\"");
257:     Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(json);
258:     if (matcher.find()) {
259:       return Long.parseLong(matcher.group(1));
260:     }
261:     throw new IllegalStateException("no session id found in hierarchy: " + json);
262:   }
263: 
264:   private static long extractAvailableSeatId(String json) {
265:     Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile(
266:         "\"seatId\"\\s*:\\s*([0-9]+).*?\"status\"\\s*:\\s*\"AVAILABLE\"",
267:         Pattern.DOTALL
268:     );
269:     Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(json);
270:     if (matcher.find()) {
271:       return Long.parseLong(matcher.group(1));
272:     }
273:     throw new IllegalStateException("no available seat found in seat map: " + json);
274:   }
275: 
276:   private static void writeSummary() throws IOException {
277:     Path targetDir = Path.of("target");
278:     Files.createDirectories(targetDir);
279:     Path summary = targetDir.resolve("api-test-summary.properties");
280: 
281:     Map<String, String> values = new LinkedHashMap<>();
282:     values.put("suite", "api_functional");
283:     values.put("total", String.valueOf(total));
284:     values.put("passed", String.valueOf(passed));
285:     values.put("failed", String.valueOf(failed));
286: 
287:     try (OutputStream output = Files.newOutputStream(summary)) {
288:       for (Map.Entry<String, String> entry : values.entrySet()) {
289:         String line = entry.getKey() + "=" + entry.getValue() + "\n";
290:         output.write(line.getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
291:       }
292:     }
293: 
294:     System.out.println("api_functional total=" + total + " passed=" + passed + " failed=" + failed);
295:   }
296: 
297:   @FunctionalInterface
298:   private interface ThrowingRunnable {
299:     void run() throws Exception;
300:   }
301: }

(End of file - total 301 lines)
</content>

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
REPORT_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/target/unit-test-summary.properties"

cd "$ROOT_DIR"
mkdir -p target

mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test

total=0
failures=0
errors=0
skipped=0

for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
  [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
  tests_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/tests="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
  failures_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/failures="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
  errors_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/errors="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
  skipped_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/skipped="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")

  tests_in_file=${tests_in_file:-0}
  failures_in_file=${failures_in_file:-0}
  errors_in_file=${errors_in_file:-0}
  skipped_in_file=${skipped_in_file:-0}

  total=$((total + tests_in_file))
  failures=$((failures + failures_in_file))
  errors=$((errors + errors_in_file))
  skipped=$((skipped + skipped_in_file))
done

failed=$((failures + errors))
passed=$((total - failed - skipped))

{
  echo "suite=backend_unit"
  echo "total=$total"
  echo "passed=$passed"
  echo "failed=$failed"
  echo "skipped=$skipped"
} > "$REPORT_FILE"

echo "backend_unit total=$total passed=$passed failed=$failed skipped=$skipped"

if [[ "$failed" -gt 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
REPORT_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/target/unit-test-summary.properties"

cd "$ROOT_DIR"
mkdir -p target

mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test

total=0
failures=0
errors=0
skipped=0

for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
  [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
  tests_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'tests="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  failures_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'failures="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  errors_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'errors="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  skipped_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'skipped="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)

  tests_in_file=${tests_in_file:-0}
  failures_in_file=${failures_in_file:-0}
  errors_in_file=${errors_in_file:-0}
  skipped_in_file=${skipped_in_file:-0}

  total=$((total + tests_in_file))
  failures=$((failures + failures_in_file))
  errors=$((errors + errors_in_file))
  skipped=$((skipped + skipped_in_file))
done

failed=$((failures + errors))
passed=$((total - failed - skipped))

{
  echo "suite=backend_unit"
  echo "total=$total"
  echo "passed=$passed"
  echo "failed=$failed"
  echo "skipped=$skipped"
} > "$REPORT_FILE"

echo "backend_unit total=$total passed=$passed failed=$failed skipped=$skipped"

if [[ "$failed" -gt 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"

files.before:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -uo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

mkdir -p target

UNIT_EXIT=0
FRONTEND_EXIT=0
API_EXIT=0
SERVER_PID=""

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${SERVER_PID}" ]]; then
    kill "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    wait "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

echo "[1/3] Running backend unit tests from unit_tests/"
bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh || UNIT_EXIT=$?

echo "[2/3] Running frontend tests"
npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?

echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Using existing API server on http://localhost:8080"
else
  echo "Starting API server with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test"
  SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &
  SERVER_PID=$!
  API_READY=0
  for _ in {1..60}; do
    if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      API_READY=1
      break
    fi
    sleep 2
  done
  if [[ "$API_READY" -ne 1 ]]; then
    echo "API server failed to start. See target/api-server.log"
    API_EXIT=1
  fi
fi

if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
  bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh || API_EXIT=$?
fi

read_prop() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  awk -F= -v k="$key" '$1==k {print $2}' "$file"
}

read_json_number() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  local value
  value=$(grep -o '"'"$key"'"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*' "$file" | awk -F: 'NR==1 {gsub(/[[:space:]]/, "", $2); print $2}')
  if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
    echo "0"
  else
    echo "$value"
  fi
}

UNIT_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "total")
UNIT_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "passed")
UNIT_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "failed")

FRONTEND_TOTAL=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numTotalTests")
FRONTEND_PASSED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numPassedTests")
FRONTEND_FAILED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numFailedTests")

API_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "total")
API_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "passed")
API_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "failed")

TOTAL_ALL=$((UNIT_TOTAL + FRONTEND_TOTAL + API_TOTAL))
PASSED_ALL=$((UNIT_PASSED + FRONTEND_PASSED + API_PASSED))
FAILED_ALL=$((UNIT_FAILED + FRONTEND_FAILED + API_FAILED))

echo
echo "=== Unified Test Summary ==="
echo "backend_unit: total=$UNIT_TOTAL passed=$UNIT_PASSED failed=$UNIT_FAILED"
echo "frontend: total=$FRONTEND_TOTAL passed=$FRONTEND_PASSED failed=$FRONTEND_FAILED"
echo "api_functional: total=$API_TOTAL passed=$API_PASSED failed=$API_FAILED"
echo "TOTAL: total=$TOTAL_ALL passed=$PASSED_ALL failed=$FAILED_ALL"

if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$FRONTEND_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$API_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

exit 0

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -uo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

mkdir -p target

UNIT_EXIT=0
FRONTEND_EXIT=0
API_EXIT=0
SERVER_PID=""

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${SERVER_PID}" ]]; then
    kill "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    wait "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

echo "[1/3] Running backend unit tests from unit_tests/"
bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh || UNIT_EXIT=$?

echo "[2/3] Running frontend tests"
if [[ ! -x "node_modules/.bin/jest" ]]; then
  npm ci --no-audit --no-fund
fi
npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?

echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Using existing API server on http://localhost:8080"
else
  echo "Starting API server with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test"
  SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &
  SERVER_PID=$!
  API_READY=0
  for _ in {1..60}; do
    if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      API_READY=1
      break
    fi
    sleep 2
  done
  if [[ "$API_READY" -ne 1 ]]; then
    echo "API server failed to start. See target/api-server.log"
    API_EXIT=1
  fi
fi

if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
  bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh || API_EXIT=$?
fi

read_prop() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  awk -F= -v k="$key" '$1==k {print $2}' "$file"
}

read_json_number() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  local value
  value=$(grep -m1 -o "\"$key\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*" "$file" | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d '[:space:]')
  if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
    echo "0"
  else
    echo "$value"
  fi
}

UNIT_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "total")
UNIT_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "passed")
UNIT_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "failed")

FRONTEND_TOTAL=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numTotalTests")
FRONTEND_PASSED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numPassedTests")
FRONTEND_FAILED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numFailedTests")

API_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "total")
API_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "passed")
API_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "failed")

TOTAL_ALL=$((UNIT_TOTAL + FRONTEND_TOTAL + API_TOTAL))
PASSED_ALL=$((UNIT_PASSED + FRONTEND_PASSED + API_PASSED))
FAILED_ALL=$((UNIT_FAILED + FRONTEND_FAILED + API_FAILED))

echo
echo "=== Unified Test Summary ==="
echo "backend_unit: total=$UNIT_TOTAL passed=$UNIT_PASSED failed=$UNIT_FAILED"
echo "frontend: total=$FRONTEND_TOTAL passed=$FRONTEND_PASSED failed=$FRONTEND_FAILED"
echo "api_functional: total=$API_TOTAL passed=$API_PASSED failed=$API_FAILED"
echo "TOTAL: total=$TOTAL_ALL passed=$PASSED_ALL failed=$FAILED_ALL"

if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$FRONTEND_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$API_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

exit 0

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

# Allow overriding SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, default to 'test' if not set
SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:-test}"

# Run API functional tests in a Docker container (no Java required on host)
docker run --rm \
	-v "$PWD":/workspace \
	-w /workspace \
	-e SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="$SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE" \
	maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 \
	bash -c "mkdir -p target/api-functional-tests && javac -d target/api-functional-tests API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java && java -cp target/api-functional-tests ApiFunctionalTests"

metadata.preview:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

# Allow overriding SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, default to 'test' if not set
SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:-test}"

# Run API functional tests in a Docker container (no Java required on host)
docker run --rm \
	-v "$PWD":/workspace \
	-w /workspace \
	-e SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="$SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE" \
	maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 \
	bash -c "mkdir -p target/api-functional-tests && javac -d target/api-functional-tests API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java && java -cp target/api-functional-tests ApiFunctionalTests"

26:   errors_in_file=${errors_in_file:-0}

28: 
29:   total=$((total + tests_in_file))
30:   failures=$((failures + failures_in_file))
31:   errors=$((errors + errors_in_file))
32:   skipped=$((skipped + skipped_in_file))

metadata.preview:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
REPORT_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/target/unit-test-summary.properties"

cd "$ROOT_DIR"
mkdir -p target

mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test

total=0
failures=0
errors=0
skipped=0

for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
  [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
  tests_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'tests="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  failures_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'failures="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)

content.text:
Implemented a minimal fix set focused only on test orchestration/runtime compatibility and summary parsing.

**Root Cause Analysis (short)**
- Frontend test stage calls `jest`, but pipeline environments without preinstalled `node_modules` hit `jest: not found` because `run_tests.sh` does not bootstrap JS deps.
- API functional test runner uses `maven:...-temurin-8` while `API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java` uses Java 11+ APIs (`java.net.http`, `Map.of`, `String.isBlank`, `Path.of`), so compilation fails under Java 8.
- Unified summary issues come from non-portable awk usage in `unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh` (`match(..., ..., array)` is not supported by all awk variants), plus fragile JSON number extraction in `run_tests.sh`, leading to parse errors/zeroed metrics.
- API runner also invokes wrong main class name (`APIFunctionalTests` vs `ApiFunctionalTests`), which would fail at runtime after compile.

**Concrete Patch Plan (ordered)**
1. Make frontend test step self-sufficient by installing deps only when `jest` binary is missing.
2. Upgrade API functional test container JDK from 8 to 17 (test-runner only), and fix Java main class name casing.
3. Replace non-portable awk XML attribute extraction in unit test summary script with portable `grep|cut`.
4. Harden unified summary JSON extraction to parse numeric keys reliably without awk extensions.

**Exact Code Changes (unified diffs)**

```diff
diff --git a/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh b/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh
index fe2b90c..aaff363 100644
--- a/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh
+++ b/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh
@@ -12,5 +12,5 @@ docker run --rm \
 	-v "$PWD":/workspace \
 	-w /workspace \
 	-e SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="$SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE" \
-	maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-8 \
-	bash -c "mkdir -p target/api-functional-tests && javac -d target/api-functional-tests API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java && java -cp target/api-functional-tests APIFunctionalTests"
+	maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 \
+	bash -c "mkdir -p target/api-functional-tests && javac -d target/api-functional-tests API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java && java -cp target/api-functional-tests ApiFunctionalTests"
```

```diff
diff --git a/repo/run_tests.sh b/repo/run_tests.sh
index 0e66668..7c5da27 100644
--- a/repo/run_tests.sh
+++ b/repo/run_tests.sh
@@ -23,6 +23,9 @@ echo "[1/3] Running backend unit tests from unit_tests/"
 bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh || UNIT_EXIT=$?
 
 echo "[2/3] Running frontend tests"
+if [[ ! -x "node_modules/.bin/jest" ]]; then
+  npm ci --no-audit --no-fund
+fi
 npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?
 
 echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
@@ -68,7 +71,7 @@ read_json_number() {
     return
   fi
   local value
-  value=$(grep -o '"'"$key"'"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*' "$file" | awk -F: 'NR==1 {gsub(/[[:space:]]/, "", $2); print $2}')
+  value=$(grep -m1 -o "\"$key\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*" "$file" | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d '[:space:]')
   if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
     echo "0"
   else
```

```diff
diff --git a/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh b/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh
index 5b51610..2e33a6a 100644
--- a/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh
+++ b/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh
@@ -16,10 +16,10 @@ skipped=0
 
 for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
   [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
-  tests_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/tests="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
-  failures_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/failures="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
-  errors_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/errors="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
-  skipped_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/skipped="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
+  tests_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'tests="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
+  failures_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'failures="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
+  errors_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'errors="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
+  skipped_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'skipped="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
 
   tests_in_file=${tests_in_file:-0}
   failures_in_file=${failures_in_file:-0}
```

**Docker/Test-Runner/Image Updates Needed**
- Update API functional test runner image only:
  - `maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-8` -> `maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17` in `API_tests/run_api_tests.sh`.
- No changes required to application `Dockerfile` build/runtime images (left intact).

**Exact Commands to Validate**

Local (Linux/macOS/CI-like shell):
- `bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh`
- `npm ci --no-audit --no-fund`
- `npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json`
- `bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh`
- `bash run_tests.sh`

Local (Windows Git Bash with Docker path conversion guard):
- `bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh`
- `npm ci --no-audit --no-fund`
- `npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json`
- `MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh`
- `MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 bash run_tests.sh`

CI:
- Keep existing pipeline entrypoint; run `bash run_tests.sh`.
- If CI runs steps separately, same 4 per-suite commands above in order.

**Rollback Plan**
- Revert only these three files:
  - `git checkout -- run_tests.sh unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh API_tests/run_api_tests.sh`
- Re-run pipeline to confirm behavior returns to pre-change baseline.
- If partial rollback needed, revert in reverse dependency order:
  1) `run_tests.sh` parser/bootstrap changes  
  2) `unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh` awk portability changes  
  3) `API_tests/run_api_tests.sh` image/classname changes

I also ran the unified script locally; frontend and unit stages passed and summary produced real totals. API stage hit a Windows Git Bash Docker path-conversion issue locally (not a CI/Linux issue), which is why I included the `MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1` local command variant.

Now I need a final gap audit to detect anything still likely to fail in a Linux CI environment.

Your tasks:

Re-audit the full test pipeline end-to-end for hidden failures.
Identify any remaining gaps not yet fixed.
Classify each gap as:
Blocker (will fail CI)
Risk (can intermittently fail CI)
Improvement (non-blocking)
For Blockers and Risks only, provide minimal targeted fixes.
Keep all business logic unchanged and avoid refactors.
Focus areas:

Shell portability (sh/bash, awk/sed differences, exit-code handling).
Tool availability assumptions (node, npm, jest, docker, mvn, javac).
Java version consistency across:
app build
unit tests
API functional tests
Path compatibility (Linux CI vs Windows local Git Bash).
Test report generation and summary correctness.
Deterministic startup/wait logic for dependent services.
Any commands that can pass locally but fail in clean CI runners.
Required output format:

Remaining gap table with columns:
Severity
File/Step
Why it can fail
Minimal fix
Unified diffs only for required fixes.
Validation commands to prove fixes.
ΓÇ£No further blockersΓÇ¥ statement if none remain.
Confidence score (0-100) with short reasoning.
Constraints:

Minimal edits only.
No unrelated cleanup.
Do not touch temporary/session artifact handling.
Preserve current repository structure and test workflow.

content.text:
Re-audited end-to-end with Linux CI assumptions (clean runner, Bash, Docker, Maven/Java/Node tooling).

**Remaining Gaps**

| Severity | File/Step | Why it can fail | Minimal fix |
|---|---|---|---|
| Blocker | `API_tests/run_api_tests.sh` (API tests in Docker) | Test container defaults to `localhost:8080`, which points to itself, not the host process started by `run_tests.sh`; API tests cannot reach server in Linux CI | Add host mapping and pass `SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL` into container (`host.docker.internal`) |
| Improvement | `run_tests.sh` startup probe | Existing API reuse (`if curl localhost:8080`) can mask stale local process on non-clean/self-hosted runners | No change required for clean Linux CI; acceptable as-is for your current workflow |
| Improvement | Tooling assumptions | `node`, `npm`, `mvn`, `docker` must exist in runner image | No workflow change required; ensure CI image includes these tools |

**Required Fix Diff (Blocker only)**

```diff
diff --git a/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh b/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh
index aaff363..15eb1b6 100644
--- a/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh
+++ b/repo/API_tests/run_api_tests.sh
@@ -6,10 +6,14 @@ cd "$ROOT_DIR"
 
 # Allow overriding SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, default to 'test' if not set
 SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:-test}"
+SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL="${SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:8080}"
 
 # Run API functional tests in a Docker container (no Java required on host)
 docker run --rm \
 	-v "$PWD":/workspace \
 	-w /workspace \
+	--add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway \
 	-e SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="$SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE" \
+	-e SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL="$SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL" \
 	maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 \
 	bash -c "mkdir -p target/api-functional-tests && javac -d target/api-functional-tests API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java && java -cp target/api-functional-tests ApiFunctionalTests"
```

**Validation Commands**

Linux CI-like validation:
- `bash -n run_tests.sh && bash -n unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh && bash -n API_tests/run_api_tests.sh`
- `bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh`
- `npm ci --no-audit --no-fund`
- `npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json`
- `SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &`
- `bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh`
- `bash run_tests.sh`

Expected final summary:
- non-zero totals for backend/frontend/api
- no awk syntax errors
- frontend and API suites execute (not skipped/zero by parser failure)

No further blockers after this fix.

Confidence: **92/100**
- High confidence on root causes and targeted fixes (frontend bootstrap, awk portability, Java 17 API runner, container-to-host routing).
- Remaining uncertainty is CI infra-specific Docker topology/version, but the current fix is the minimal Linux-CI-safe path without refactoring workflow.

You are a senior CI stabilization engineer.
Apply only minimal, targeted fixes to make the unified test runner reliable end-to-end.

Current status:

Individual stages can pass, but unified run_tests.sh still fails intermittently.
Observed failures:
Maven launcher error during backend stage in unified run: Could not find or load main class org.codehaus.plexus.classworlds.launcher.Launcher.
API functional test has intermittent 409 Conflict on seat reservation flow.
Unified summary can report stale counts from prior artifacts when a stage fails early.
Task:

Fix these remaining blockers only.
Keep business logic unchanged.
No broad refactors.
Preserve existing repository structure and workflow.
Required changes:

Make backend unit stage invocation robust in run_tests.sh and/or unit test script:
Ensure Maven command runs from correct directory with stable environment.
Fail clearly if Maven bootstrap is broken.
Make API functional stage deterministic:
Remove flaky state causing intermittent 409 on seat reservation.
Ensure test data/setup is isolated per run or retried safely for known conflict condition.
Prevent stale summary artifacts:
Clear or regenerate stage summary files at script start.
If a stage fails before producing fresh summary, report that stage as failed with zero/unknown instead of old values.
Output format:

Root cause per blocker.
Unified diffs only for modified files.
Validation commands and concise results.

bash -n run_tests.sh && bash -n unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh && bash -n API_tests/run_api_tests.sh

<content>1: #!/usr/bin/env bash
2: set -uo pipefail
3: 
4: ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
5: cd "$ROOT_DIR"
6: 
7: mkdir -p target
8: 
9: UNIT_EXIT=0
10: FRONTEND_EXIT=0
11: API_EXIT=0
12: SERVER_PID=""
13: 
14: cleanup() {
15:   if [[ -n "${SERVER_PID}" ]]; then
16:     kill "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
17:     wait "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
18:   fi
19: }
20: trap cleanup EXIT
21: 
22: echo "[1/3] Running backend unit tests from unit_tests/"
23: bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh || UNIT_EXIT=$?
24: 
25: echo "[2/3] Running frontend tests"
26: if [[ ! -x "node_modules/.bin/jest" ]]; then
27:   npm ci --no-audit --no-fund
28: fi
29: npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?
30: 
31: echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
32: if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
33:   echo "Using existing API server on http://localhost:8080"
34: else
35:   echo "Starting API server with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test"
36:   SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &
37:   SERVER_PID=$!
38:   API_READY=0
39:   for _ in {1..60}; do
40:     if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
41:       API_READY=1
42:       break
43:     fi
44:     sleep 2
45:   done
46:   if [[ "$API_READY" -ne 1 ]]; then
47:     echo "API server failed to start. See target/api-server.log"
48:     API_EXIT=1
49:   fi
50: fi
51: 
52: if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
53:   bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh || API_EXIT=$?
54: fi
55: 
56: read_prop() {
57:   local file="$1"
58:   local key="$2"
59:   if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
60:     echo "0"
61:     return
62:   fi
63:   awk -F= -v k="$key" '$1==k {print $2}' "$file"
64: }
65: 
66: read_json_number() {
67:   local file="$1"
68:   local key="$2"
69:   if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
70:     echo "0"
71:     return
72:   fi
73:   local value
74:   value=$(grep -m1 -o "\"$key\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*" "$file" | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d '[:space:]')
75:   if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
76:     echo "0"
77:   else
78:     echo "$value"
79:   fi
80: }
81: 
82: UNIT_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "total")
83: UNIT_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "passed")
84: UNIT_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "failed")
85: 
86: FRONTEND_TOTAL=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numTotalTests")
87: FRONTEND_PASSED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numPassedTests")
88: FRONTEND_FAILED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numFailedTests")
89: 
90: API_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "total")
91: API_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "passed")
92: API_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "failed")
93: 
94: TOTAL_ALL=$((UNIT_TOTAL + FRONTEND_TOTAL + API_TOTAL))
95: PASSED_ALL=$((UNIT_PASSED + FRONTEND_PASSED + API_PASSED))
96: FAILED_ALL=$((UNIT_FAILED + FRONTEND_FAILED + API_FAILED))
97: 
98: echo
99: echo "=== Unified Test Summary ==="
100: echo "backend_unit: total=$UNIT_TOTAL passed=$UNIT_PASSED failed=$UNIT_FAILED"
101: echo "frontend: total=$FRONTEND_TOTAL passed=$FRONTEND_PASSED failed=$FRONTEND_FAILED"
102: echo "api_functional: total=$API_TOTAL passed=$API_PASSED failed=$API_FAILED"
103: echo "TOTAL: total=$TOTAL_ALL passed=$PASSED_ALL failed=$FAILED_ALL"
104: 
105: if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$FRONTEND_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$API_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
106:   exit 1
107: fi
108: 
109: exit 0

metadata.preview:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

# Allow overriding SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE, default to 'test' if not set
SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="${SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE:-test}"
SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL="${SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL:-http://host.docker.internal:8080}"

# Run API functional tests in a Docker container (no Java required on host)
docker run --rm \
	-v "$PWD":/workspace \
	-w /workspace \
	--add-host host.docker.internal:host-gateway \
	-e SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE="$SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE" \
	-e SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL="$SILVERSTAGE_BASE_URL" \
	maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-17 \
	bash -c "mkdir -p target/api-functional-tests && javac -d target/api-functional-tests API_tests/ApiFunctionalTests.java && java -cp target/api-functional-tests ApiFunctionalTests"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
REPORT_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/target/unit-test-summary.properties"

cd "$ROOT_DIR"
mkdir -p target

mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test

total=0
failures=0
errors=0
skipped=0

for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
  [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
  tests_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'tests="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  failures_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'failures="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  errors_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'errors="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  skipped_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'skipped="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)

  tests_in_file=${tests_in_file:-0}
  failures_in_file=${failures_in_file:-0}
  errors_in_file=${errors_in_file:-0}
  skipped_in_file=${skipped_in_file:-0}

  total=$((total + tests_in_file))
  failures=$((failures + failures_in_file))
  errors=$((errors + errors_in_file))
  skipped=$((skipped + skipped_in_file))
done

failed=$((failures + errors))
passed=$((total - failed - skipped))

{
  echo "suite=backend_unit"
  echo "total=$total"
  echo "passed=$passed"
  echo "failed=$failed"
  echo "skipped=$skipped"
} > "$REPORT_FILE"

echo "backend_unit total=$total passed=$passed failed=$failed skipped=$skipped"

if [[ "$failed" -gt 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." && pwd)"
REPORT_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/target/unit-test-summary.properties"

cd "$ROOT_DIR"
mkdir -p target

if ! command -v mvn >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Maven executable not found in PATH"
  exit 1
fi

MAVEN_LOG="target/unit-test-maven.log"
if ! env -u CLASSPATH mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test >"$MAVEN_LOG" 2>&1; then
  if grep -q "org.codehaus.plexus.classworlds.launcher.Launcher" "$MAVEN_LOG"; then
    echo "Maven bootstrap failed (classworlds launcher not found). See $MAVEN_LOG"
  else
    echo "Backend unit test Maven execution failed. See $MAVEN_LOG"
  fi
  exit 1
fi

total=0
failures=0
errors=0
skipped=0

for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
  [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
  tests_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'tests="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  failures_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'failures="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  errors_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'errors="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
  skipped_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'skipped="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)

  tests_in_file=${tests_in_file:-0}
  failures_in_file=${failures_in_file:-0}
  errors_in_file=${errors_in_file:-0}
  skipped_in_file=${skipped_in_file:-0}

  total=$((total + tests_in_file))
  failures=$((failures + failures_in_file))
  errors=$((errors + errors_in_file))
  skipped=$((skipped + skipped_in_file))
done

failed=$((failures + errors))
passed=$((total - failed - skipped))

{
  echo "suite=backend_unit"
  echo "total=$total"
  echo "passed=$passed"
  echo "failed=$failed"
  echo "skipped=$skipped"
} > "$REPORT_FILE"

echo "backend_unit total=$total passed=$passed failed=$failed skipped=$skipped"

if [[ "$failed" -gt 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

files.before:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -uo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

mkdir -p target

UNIT_EXIT=0
FRONTEND_EXIT=0
API_EXIT=0
SERVER_PID=""

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${SERVER_PID}" ]]; then
    kill "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    wait "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

echo "[1/3] Running backend unit tests from unit_tests/"
bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh || UNIT_EXIT=$?

echo "[2/3] Running frontend tests"
if [[ ! -x "node_modules/.bin/jest" ]]; then
  npm ci --no-audit --no-fund
fi
npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?

echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Using existing API server on http://localhost:8080"
else
  echo "Starting API server with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test"
  SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &
  SERVER_PID=$!
  API_READY=0
  for _ in {1..60}; do
    if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
      API_READY=1
      break
    fi
    sleep 2
  done
  if [[ "$API_READY" -ne 1 ]]; then
    echo "API server failed to start. See target/api-server.log"
    API_EXIT=1
  fi
fi

if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
  bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh || API_EXIT=$?
fi

read_prop() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  awk -F= -v k="$key" '$1==k {print $2}' "$file"
}

read_json_number() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  local value
  value=$(grep -m1 -o "\"$key\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*" "$file" | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d '[:space:]')
  if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
    echo "0"
  else
    echo "$value"
  fi
}

UNIT_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "total")
UNIT_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "passed")
UNIT_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "failed")

FRONTEND_TOTAL=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numTotalTests")
FRONTEND_PASSED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numPassedTests")
FRONTEND_FAILED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numFailedTests")

API_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "total")
API_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "passed")
API_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "failed")

TOTAL_ALL=$((UNIT_TOTAL + FRONTEND_TOTAL + API_TOTAL))
PASSED_ALL=$((UNIT_PASSED + FRONTEND_PASSED + API_PASSED))
FAILED_ALL=$((UNIT_FAILED + FRONTEND_FAILED + API_FAILED))

echo
echo "=== Unified Test Summary ==="
echo "backend_unit: total=$UNIT_TOTAL passed=$UNIT_PASSED failed=$UNIT_FAILED"
echo "frontend: total=$FRONTEND_TOTAL passed=$FRONTEND_PASSED failed=$FRONTEND_FAILED"
echo "api_functional: total=$API_TOTAL passed=$API_PASSED failed=$API_FAILED"
echo "TOTAL: total=$TOTAL_ALL passed=$PASSED_ALL failed=$FAILED_ALL"

if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$FRONTEND_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$API_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

exit 0
files.after:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -uo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

mkdir -p target
rm -f target/unit-test-summary.properties target/frontend-test-summary.json target/api-test-summary.properties

UNIT_EXIT=0
FRONTEND_EXIT=0
API_EXIT=0
SERVER_PID=""

if ! command -v mvn >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Maven executable not found in PATH"
  UNIT_EXIT=1
  API_EXIT=1
fi

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${SERVER_PID}" ]]; then
    kill "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    wait "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

echo "[1/3] Running backend unit tests from unit_tests/"
if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
  bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh || UNIT_EXIT=$?
fi

echo "[2/3] Running frontend tests"
if [[ ! -x "node_modules/.bin/jest" ]]; then
  npm ci --no-audit --no-fund
fi
npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?

echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Using existing API server on http://localhost:8080"
else
  echo "Starting API server with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test"
  if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
    env -u CLASSPATH SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &
  else
    echo "Skipping API server start due to earlier Maven precheck failure"
  fi
  SERVER_PID=$!
  API_READY=0
  if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
    for _ in {1..60}; do
      if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        API_READY=1
        break
      fi
      sleep 2
    done
    if [[ "$API_READY" -ne 1 ]]; then
      echo "API server failed to start. See target/api-server.log"
      API_EXIT=1
    fi
  fi
fi

if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
  bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh || API_EXIT=$?
fi

read_prop() {

files.before:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -uo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
cd "$ROOT_DIR"

mkdir -p target
rm -f target/unit-test-summary.properties target/frontend-test-summary.json target/api-test-summary.properties

UNIT_EXIT=0
FRONTEND_EXIT=0
API_EXIT=0
SERVER_PID=""

if ! command -v mvn >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Maven executable not found in PATH"
  UNIT_EXIT=1
  API_EXIT=1
fi

cleanup() {
  if [[ -n "${SERVER_PID}" ]]; then
    kill "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
    wait "${SERVER_PID}" >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
  fi
}
trap cleanup EXIT

echo "[1/3] Running backend unit tests from unit_tests/"
if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
  bash unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh || UNIT_EXIT=$?
fi

echo "[2/3] Running frontend tests"
if [[ ! -x "node_modules/.bin/jest" ]]; then
  npm ci --no-audit --no-fund
fi
npm run test:frontend -- --json --outputFile target/frontend-test-summary.json || FRONTEND_EXIT=$?

echo "[3/3] Running API functional tests from API_tests/"
if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Using existing API server on http://localhost:8080"
else
  echo "Starting API server with SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test"
  if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
    env -u CLASSPATH SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=test mvn -q -DskipTests spring-boot:run > target/api-server.log 2>&1 &
  else
    echo "Skipping API server start due to earlier Maven precheck failure"
  fi
  SERVER_PID=$!
  API_READY=0
  if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
    for _ in {1..60}; do
      if curl -fsS "http://localhost:8080/api/events" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        API_READY=1
        break
      fi
      sleep 2
    done
    if [[ "$API_READY" -ne 1 ]]; then
      echo "API server failed to start. See target/api-server.log"
      API_EXIT=1
    fi
  fi
fi

if [[ "$API_EXIT" -eq 0 ]]; then
  bash API_tests/run_api_tests.sh || API_EXIT=$?
fi

read_prop() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  awk -F= -v k="$key" '$1==k {print $2}' "$file"
}

read_json_number() {
  local file="$1"
  local key="$2"
  if [[ ! -f "$file" ]]; then
    echo "0"
    return
  fi
  local value
  value=$(grep -m1 -o "\"$key\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*[0-9]*" "$file" | cut -d: -f2 | tr -d '[:space:]')
  if [[ -z "$value" ]]; then
    echo "0"
  else
    echo "$value"
  fi
}

UNIT_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "total")
UNIT_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "passed")
UNIT_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/unit-test-summary.properties" "failed")

FRONTEND_TOTAL=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numTotalTests")
FRONTEND_PASSED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numPassedTests")
FRONTEND_FAILED=$(read_json_number "target/frontend-test-summary.json" "numFailedTests")

API_TOTAL=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "total")
API_PASSED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "passed")
API_FAILED=$(read_prop "target/api-test-summary.properties" "failed")

UNIT_STATUS="ok"
FRONTEND_STATUS="ok"
API_STATUS="ok"

if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
  UNIT_STATUS="failed"
fi
if [[ "$FRONTEND_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
  FRONTEND_STATUS="failed"
fi
if [[ "$API_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
  API_STATUS="failed"
fi

TOTAL_ALL=$((UNIT_TOTAL + FRONTEND_TOTAL + API_TOTAL))
PASSED_ALL=$((UNIT_PASSED + FRONTEND_PASSED + API_PASSED))
FAILED_ALL=$((UNIT_FAILED + FRONTEND_FAILED + API_FAILED))

echo
echo "=== Unified Test Summary ==="
echo "backend_unit: status=$UNIT_STATUS total=$UNIT_TOTAL passed=$UNIT_PASSED failed=$UNIT_FAILED"
echo "frontend: status=$FRONTEND_STATUS total=$FRONTEND_TOTAL passed=$FRONTEND_PASSED failed=$FRONTEND_FAILED"
echo "api_functional: status=$API_STATUS total=$API_TOTAL passed=$API_PASSED failed=$API_FAILED"
echo "TOTAL: total=$TOTAL_ALL passed=$PASSED_ALL failed=$FAILED_ALL"

if [[ "$UNIT_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$FRONTEND_EXIT" -ne 0 || "$API_EXIT" -ne 0 ]]; then
  exit 1
fi

exit 0

metadata.description: Shows final diffs for modified blocker fixes

content.text:
Root cause per blocker:
- Maven launcher failure in unified run: `mvn` execution can be affected by polluted Java env (`CLASSPATH`) or broken Maven bootstrap; previous scripts had no precheck/clear failure path.
- Intermittent API 409 in seat reservation: test picks first available seat once and fails immediately on conflict when seat state changes concurrently.
- Stale unified summary counts: summary files were reused across runs, so an early stage failure could still show old totals.

```diff
diff --git a/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh b/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh
index 5b51610..9d0eca1 100644
--- a/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh
+++ b/repo/unit_tests/run_unit_tests.sh
@@ -7,7 +7,20 @@ REPORT_FILE="$ROOT_DIR/target/unit-test-summary.properties"
 cd "$ROOT_DIR"
 mkdir -p target
 
-mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test
+if ! command -v mvn >/dev/null 2>&1; then
+  echo "Maven executable not found in PATH"
+  exit 1
+fi
+
+MAVEN_LOG="target/unit-test-maven.log"
+if ! env -u CLASSPATH mvn -q -Dtest='com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*Test' test >"$MAVEN_LOG" 2>&1; then
+  if grep -q "org.codehaus.plexus.classworlds.launcher.Launcher" "$MAVEN_LOG"; then
+    echo "Maven bootstrap failed (classworlds launcher not found). See $MAVEN_LOG"
+  else
+    echo "Backend unit test Maven execution failed. See $MAVEN_LOG"
+  fi
+  exit 1
+fi
 
 total=0
 failures=0
@@ -16,10 +29,10 @@ skipped=0
 
 for file in target/surefire-reports/TEST-com.eaglepoint.venue.service.*.xml; do
   [[ -f "$file" ]] || continue
-  tests_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/tests="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
-  failures_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/failures="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
-  errors_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/errors="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
-  skipped_in_file=$(awk 'match($0,/skipped="([0-9]+)"/,a){print a[1]; exit}' "$file")
+  tests_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'tests="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
+  failures_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'failures="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
+  errors_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'errors="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
+  skipped_in_file=$(grep -m1 -o 'skipped="[0-9]*"' "$file" | cut -d'"' -f2)
 
   tests_in_file=${tests_in_file:-0}
   failures_in_file=${failures_in_file:-0}

 cd "$ROOT_DIR"
 
 mkdir -p target
+rm -f target/unit-test-summary.properties target/frontend-test-summary.json target/api-test-summary.properties
 
 UNIT_EXIT=0
 FRONTEND_EXIT=0
 API_EXIT=0
 SERVER_PID=""
 
+if ! command -v mvn >/dev/null 2>&1; then
```
